query:
SELECT id, invoice_number, type, subtotal_net, tax_amount, total_gross, project_id,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoice_items ii WHERE ii.invoice_id = invoices.id AND ii.is_optional = 0) as required_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoice_items ii WHERE ii.invoice_id = invoices.id AND ii.is_optional = 1) as optional_count
FROM invoices
WHERE subtotal_net = '0.00' OR subtotal_net = '0' OR subtotal_net IS NULL
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT sender_name, sender_company FROM company_settings LIMIT 1;
